title: Autocomplete Command Blacklist
description: Autocomplete command blacklist for Fabric servers
body: Simple blacklist for command autocompletion. Generates an `autocomplete-blacklist.txt` file in your `config` folder with instructions. Insert the desired blocked root command nodes here (e.g. `weather`, `time`, etc.), each on a new line. These commands won't be sent to clients for autocompletion.
